endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations
endpoints.description: The location of the responsible ASC of the specific subscription (home region). For each subscription there is only one responsible location. The location in the response should be used to read or write other resources in ASC according to their ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.
